keywords: SETNX provision lock idempotent tenant bootstrap bulkSeed synchronous TenantProvisioned TenantProvisioningFailed storeDocument before enqueue ALS tenant isolation
teachingPoint: T605 TenantProvisioningOrchestrator MUST acquire a SETNX provision lock at ORDER 1 before any write. Concurrent provisioning for the same tenantId is prevented by the lock. bulkSeed MUST be synchronous — async scatter leaves tenants half-initialized on crash. storeDocument(tenantRecord) MUST precede enqueue(TenantProvisioned) per DNA-8. TenantProvisioningFailed MUST be emitted on all error paths.
ironRules: SETNX provision lock acquired at ORDER 1 — any concurrent call on same tenantId is rejected with TenantProvisioningFailed
bulkSeed is synchronous (sequential await chain) — Promise.all/allSettled scatter is prohibited
storeDocument(tenantRecord) MUST complete before enqueue(TenantProvisioned) — DNA-8 outbox pattern
TenantProvisioningFailed MUST be emitted on every error path before returning DataProcessResult.failure
tenantId resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — never from request payload
